top_findings.summary: This skill requests installation of Homebrew (via curl download from external source) and ffmpeg, which creates unnecessary system-level changes. A meeting transcription tool should process files locally with existing libraries rather than requiring users to install system-wide packages through package managers. Additionally, the skill includes `watchdog` (filesystem monitoring library) which isn't explained in the documented functionality, suggesting potential hidden file monitoring capabilities beyond the stated purpose of processing individual video files.
